返回本批次

学校使用 AI 删除了 200 本书，包括奥威尔的《1984》和《暮光之城》

School uses AI to remove 200 books, including Orwell's 1984 and Twilight

www.lbc.co.uk 作者 toofy 分数 45 评论 12 2026/03/27 04:23
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 大曼彻斯特中学的高级工作人员使用人工智能从图书馆中删除了 200 本被认为“不合适”的书籍 2026 年 3 月 26 日，11:06 |更新时间： 15 小时前
  2. 大曼彻斯特中学的高级工作人员使用人工智能指定 200 本被认为“不合适”的书籍从图书馆中删除。图片：阿拉米
  3. 活动人士声称，一所学校使用人工智能将乔治·奥威尔的《1984》和斯蒂芬妮·迈耶的《暮光之城》等书籍从书架上撤下。正在加载音频...大曼彻斯特中学的高级工作人员使用人工智能从图书馆中删除了200本被认为“不合适”的书籍。其中包括米歇尔·奥巴马的自传和尼古拉斯·斯帕克斯的《笔记本》。阅读更多：英格兰教会学校在宗教教育课程中“教孩子们伊斯兰祈祷”后引发争议阅读更多：名誉扫地的主持人休·爱德华兹在一系列关于他垮台的报道后大幅削减了475万英镑的房屋要价空气
  4. 人工智能生成的摘要警告说，经典的反乌托邦小说《1984》有“酷刑、暴力、性胁迫的主题”。图片：阿拉米
  5. 一家言论自由慈善机构声称，学校询问人工智能聊天机器人哪些书不适合学生。学校图书管理员表示，当她被告知删除所有“不是为儿童编写的”、“主题可能令儿童不安”和“构成保护风险”的书籍时，她“目瞪口呆”。当她拒绝禁止这些书籍时，她受到了“保护”调查。这导致她辞职并与 Index 取得联系，条件是该组织保护她匿名。其中许多书籍最初在 2025 年 11 月清洗开始时被删除。学校校长首先要求删除劳拉·贝茨的非小说类图书《讨厌女性的男人》，该书揭露了非独身文化。这本书被放在专门为年龄较大的学生准备的区域，由于“暴露了厌恶女性的信仰”，被认为是不合适的。很快对图书管理员展开了调查，图书馆作为“临时保护措施”而关闭。该工作人员被指控将“不适当的书籍”带入学校，并向理事会报告为保护风险。Index 表示，它已经看到了一份它认为可能不适当的 193 本书的清单。

Original Summary

  1. Senior staff at the secondary school in Greater Manchester used AI to earmark 200 books for removal from its library that were deemed "inappropriate" 26 Mar 2026, 11:06 | Updated: 15h ago
  2. Senior staff at the secondary school in Greater Manchester used AI to earmark 200 books for removal from its library that were deemed "inappropriate". Picture: Alamy
  3. A school used artificial intelligence to remove books such as George Orwell's 1984 and Stephanie Meyer's Twilight from its shelves, campaigners claim. Loading audio... Senior staff at the secondary school in Greater Manchester used AI to earmark 200 books for removal from its library that were deemed "inappropriate".Among those pulled were Michelle Obama's autobiography and The Notebook by Nicholas Sparks.Read more: Row erupts after Church of England school 'taught children Islamic prayer' in Religious Education lessonRead more: Disgraced presenter Huw Edwards slashes asking price on £4.75million home after series on his downfall airs
  4. The AI-generated summary warned that the classic dystopian novel 1984 had "themes of torture, violence, sexual coercion". Picture: Alamy
  5. A freedom of expression charity claims the school asked an AI chatbot which books were not suitable for its pupils.The school librarian said she was "gobsmacked" when she was told to remove any books that was "not written for children", had "themes that could be upsetting to children" and "constitute a safeguarding risk".And when she refused to ban these books, she was put under a 'safeguarding' investigation.This led her to resign and get in contact with Index, on the condition the organisation protected her anonymity.Many of these books were initially removed in November 2025, when the purge first started.The school's headteacher first demanded the removal of Laura Bates' nonfiction title Men Who Hate Women, which is an exposé of incel culture.The book, which was kept in a special section for older pupils, was thought to be inappropriate due to 'exposure of misogynistic beliefs'.An investigation into the librarian was soon launched and the library closed as a "temporary safeguarding measure".The staff member was accused of introducing "inappropriate books" into the school and reported to the council as a safeguarding risk.Index says it has seen a list of 193 books which it deemed might be inappropriate.

评论（默认中文）

toofy 2026/03/27 04:25
图书管理员因拒绝查禁这些书籍而受到调查。

> 很快对图书馆员展开了调查，并关闭了图书馆作为“临时保护措施”。

当然，《1984》是被禁的书之一。

the librarian was put under investigation when she refused to ban the books.

> An investigation into the librarian was soon launched and the library closed as a "temporary safeguarding measure".

of course 1984 is one of the books being banned.

在 HN 中查看
ivell 2026/03/27 06:18
看来《1984》是大多数政府用来激励自己的手册。绝对不是我们平民应该接触到的东西。

/s（对于那少数人）..

It seems 1984 is the manual that most governments are using to inspire themselves. Definitely not something that us plebs should have access to.

/s (for those few)..

在 HN 中查看
agrishin 2026/03/27 07:17
我大致同时红了《1984》和《美丽新世界》，有一段时间我觉得《1984》太不现实了，我认为bnw是更有可能的场景。 我错了。
I red 1984 and "Brave new world" roughly at the same time, and for quite some time I thought 1984 to be too unrealistic, and I considered bnw as more likely scenario. I was wrong.
在 HN 中查看
zombar 2026/03/27 09:57
我记得我对《使女的故事》也有类似的感觉，我放弃观看这部电视节目，因为我实际上会哭着入睡。

毫无疑问即将到来。就好像他们决心让反乌托邦的噩梦成为现实，几乎就好像他们知道末日即将来临，或者这种特殊的文明迭代即将结束，他们决心从体验中榨取灵魂。

为了什么目的？分散注意力？个人致富？

I remember having a similar feeling about 'A Handmaids Tale', a TV show I gave up watching because I would actually weep myself to sleep.

Coming soon no doubt. It's like they are determined to make dystopian nightmares a reality, almost as if they know the end is nigh or this particular iteration of civilization is drawing to a close and they are determined to squeeze the very soul out of the experience.

To what end? Distraction? Personal enrichment?

在 HN 中查看
jleyank 2026/03/27 05:09
我听说各种宗教文本都有强烈、敏感、有时甚至是暴力的主题。 然而没有人禁止它们。 想知道为什么。
I’ve heard that various religious texts have strong, sensitive sometimes violent themes. Yet nobody bans them. Wonder why.
在 HN 中查看
BobBagwill 2026/03/27 07:21
我想知道《华氏451》是否也被禁了？ 或者也许它被保留为操作手册？
I wonder if Fahrenheit 451 was banned too? Or maybe it was kept as a how-to manual?
在 HN 中查看
okokwhatever 2026/03/27 04:32
我们需要为子孙后代保护文化（古老的、现代的和现实的）是有原因的。这是我们需要尽快解决的代际责任。
There is a reason why we need to safeguard the culture (old, recent & actual) for the future generations. This is a intergenerational responsibility that we need to tackle asap.

boznz 2026/03/27 08:15
标题充满讽刺意味
The title drips with irony

zthrowaway 2026/03/27 06:06

UK doing UK things per usual.
在 HN 中查看
toofy 2026/03/27 08:22
不幸的是，我们在美国的一些地方也存在这个问题。

特别是佛罗里达州和德克萨斯州。 [0]

去年，佛罗里达州至少有 2,300 起禁书事件，德克萨斯州至少有 1,700 起。

看到这一切发生得如此之快真是太疯狂了。

[0] https://pen.org/book-bans/book-ban-resources/ （如果您向下滚动到地图，它会显示各州禁书的实例数量）

unfortunately, we have the problem in a few places in the US as well.

florida and texas in particular. [0]

last year florida has at least 2,300 instances of book bannings and texas had at least 1,700.

its wild to watch this all happen so quickly.

[0] https://pen.org/book-bans/book-ban-resources/ (if you scroll down to the map it shows how many instances of book bannings by state)

drweevil 2026/03/27 07:47
“维护”。多么非常，嗯，奥威尔式的。
“Safeguarding”. How very, um, Orwellian.
